name: LG_UPDATE_COSTPROC_002_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATE_COSTPROC_002_01
       @TRANTYPE  SMALLINT,
       @STTRANSREF INT,
       @PRDTRANSREF INT,
       @RECVSTTRANSREF INT,
       @LNTOT  FLOAT,
       @LNRPTOT  FLOAT,
       @LNTOTUFRS FLOAT,
       @LNRPTOTUFRS FLOAT,
       @COEF  SMALLINT
       AS
SELECT @LNTOT = @LNTOT * @COEF
SELECT @LNRPTOT = @LNRPTOT * @COEF
SELECT @LNTOTUFRS = @LNTOTUFRS * @COEF
SELECT @LNRPTOTUFRS = @LNRPTOTUFRS * @COEF
IF (@TRANTYPE = 0) OR (@TRANTYPE IS NULL)
BEGIN
      IF (@STTRANSREF > 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_STLINE WHERE (LOGICALREF = @STTRANSREF))
      UPDATE LG_002_01_STLINE
      SET DIFFPRICE = DIFFPRICE + @LNTOT, DIFFREPPRICE = DIFFREPPRICE + @LNRPTOT,
          COSTDISTPRICE = COSTDISTPRICE+ @LNTOT, COSTDISTREPPRICE = COSTDISTREPPRICE + @LNRPTOT,
          DIFFPRICEUFRS = DIFFPRICEUFRS + @LNTOTUFRS, DIFFREPPRICEUFRS = DIFFREPPRICEUFRS + @LNRPTOTUFRS,
          COSTDISTPRICEUFRS = COSTDISTPRICEUFRS+ @LNTOTUFRS, COSTDISTREPPRICEUFRS = COSTDISTREPPRICEUFRS + @LNRPTOTUFRS
      WHERE (LOGICALREF = @STTRANSREF)
      IF (@RECVSTTRANSREF > 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_STLINE WHERE (LOGICALREF = @RECVSTTRANSREF))
       UPDATE LG_002_01_STLINE
       SET DIFFPRICE = DIFFPRICE + @LNTOT, DIFFREPPRICE = DIFFREPPRICE + @LNRPTOT,
           COSTDISTPRICE = COSTDISTPRICE+ @LNTOT, COSTDISTREPPRICE = COSTDISTREPPRICE + @LNRPTOT,
           DIFFPRICEUFRS = DIFFPRICEUFRS + @LNTOTUFRS, DIFFREPPRICEUFRS = DIFFREPPRICEUFRS + @LNRPTOTUFRS,
           COSTDISTPRICEUFRS = COSTDISTPRICEUFRS+ @LNTOTUFRS, COSTDISTREPPRICEUFRS = COSTDISTREPPRICEUFRS + @LNRPTOTUFRS
       WHERE (LOGICALREF = @RECVSTTRANSREF)
END
ELSE
BEGIN
      IF (@PRDTRANSREF > 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_PRDCOST WHERE (LOGICALREF = @PRDTRANSREF))
      UPDATE LG_002_01_PRDCOST
      SET TOTDIFFPRICE = TOTDIFFPRICE + @LNTOT,
          TOTDIFFREPPRICE = TOTDIFFREPPRICE + @LNRPTOT,
          TOTDIFFPRICEUFRS = TOTDIFFPRICEUFRS + @LNTOTUFRS,
          TOTDIFFREPPRICEUFRS = TOTDIFFREPPRICEUFRS + @LNRPTOTUFRS
      WHERE (LOGICALREF = @PRDTRANSREF)
END
